emails.subject: Checkout for 12/22
emails.body: Checkout for 12/22 Kate, checked out with Amerex Tom Alonso: 484585.01 Enron sells Constellation price: 260.00 484586.01 Enron sells Dynegy price: 250.00 price just flipped. Thanks

emails.subject: Re: Checkout for 12/22
emails.body: Re: Checkout for 12/22 I just wanted to check in with you before changing these deals, since it's been a few days since your e-mail. Tom Alonso wasn't in the office today and I tried reaching him by phone to confirm. These are the prices he has in his trade log, so as far as I can tell they are correct. Are you saying that these prices need to be switched? Please let me know, and I'll fix it right up. Thanks, Kate Stephanie Piwetz 12/22/2000 08:36 AM

emails.subject: Re: Checkout for 12/22
emails.body: Kate, I believe all taken care of. I looked in audit viewer and it looks like tom changed/flipped the prices. Thanks for following up. Stephanie Kate Symes 01/03/2001 06:20 PM
